metadata.name: vault_verifier_geofence
metadata.description: On-chain Groth16 verifier for the geofence vault circuit (N=32, 4 public signals).

instructions.name: verify
docs: Verify a Groth16 proof for the geofence circuit (N=32 bit-width, 4
public signals — minLat, maxLat, minLon, maxLon).
On success: ix succeeds with no state change. Verifier programs are pure
dispatchers; the calling program records the proof receipt.

errors.name: WrongSignalCount
errors.msg: public signals length does not match circuit shape
